---
title: "About Me"
image: ASUNHeadshot.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rayne-aurit-08538a29a/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/raurit

---

Rayne Aurit is student pursuing their bachelor's degrees in Statistics and Data Analytics and Computer Science at the University of Nebraska- Lincoln. Currently on their third year of study, they have gotten many valuable experiences in the Statistics Department and as an associate of the Jeffrey S. Raikes School of Computer Science and Management. They worked as an AI in STEM Education Intern underneath Nebraska 4-H, gaining many experiences creating curriculum on statistics and data science. In preparation for graduate school and exploring new horizons, they are conducting research at the University of Iowa underneath Dr. Juanpablo Hourcade as a participant of the Computing for Health and Well-being REU.

Their interests include computational statistics, ethics of emerging technology, and more that will be shaped as they continue their education.
